raw_consumer_statement:
I am a small business owner who processes orders through XXXX XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX a customer placed an order totaling XXXX, paid with an American Express card. The order was shipped, delivered, and confirmed with full tracking and photographic proof of delivery through USPS to their mailbox Despite submitting this verified delivery evidence to Shopify Payments ( the payment processor ) and American Express, a chargeback was approved in favor of the cardholder. Both XXXX and AmEx received proof that the product was successfully delivered, yet the case was closed against me. XXXX also charged me a {$15.00} dispute fee, even though I provided full documentation supporting my case.

I contacted both companies multiple times : XXXX Support confirmed in writing that they can not contact American Express directly, since they process through a third-party banking partner.

American Express instructed me that XXXX ( as the payment facilitator ) must contact their premium partner servicing team to reopen the case. 

XXXX later informed me that once a decision is made, it is final and can not be reopened, even if there is proof of delivery.

This circular process left me with no resolution, no refund, and no accountability from either company. I have suffered a financial loss for a product that was delivered and received by the customer, and I am being penalized with a dispute fee on top of it.

This demonstrates a serious flaw in the dispute-handling process for merchants using XXXX XXXX  and American Express . I am requesting that this case be reviewed and reopened, that my funds ( including the {$15.00} fee ) be returned, and that appropriate action be taken to prevent this issue from recurring for other small business owners.
